SEARCH
Package org.skeleton.player

Class Player

java.lang.Object
org.skeleton.player.Player
public class Player extends Object
Represents a player in the game. Manages the player's assets, score, and actions (moving bus and snowplows).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Player(String name)
    Constructs a new Player with a given name.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void

    Adds equipment to a specific snowplow.

    Adds money to the player's balance.

    Adds to the player's score.

    Adds a snowplow to the player's collection.

    Moves the player's bus to a destination lane.

    Moves a specific snowplow owned by the player.

    Resets player state for a new turn.

    Attempts to spend a certain amount of money.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name)
      Constructs a new Player with a given name.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the player.

  • Method Details

    • moveBus

      public void moveBus(Lane destination)
      Moves the player's bus to a destination lane.
      Parameters:
      destination - The target lane.

    • moveSnowplow

      public void moveSnowplow(Snowplow sp, Node target, Lane via)
      Moves a specific snowplow owned by the player.
      Parameters:
      sp - The snowplow to move.
      target - The target node.
      via - The lane used for the movement.

    • addSnowplow

      public void addSnowplow(Snowplow sp)
      Adds a snowplow to the player's collection.
      Parameters:
      sp - The snowplow to add.

    • spendMoney

      public boolean spendMoney(int amount)
      Attempts to spend a certain amount of money.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to spend.
      Returns:
      true if the player had enough money, false otherwise.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the player's name.
      Returns:
      The name.

    • getMoney

      public int getMoney()
      Gets the player's current balance.
      Returns:
      The amount of money.

    • addMoney

      public void addMoney(int amount)
      Adds money to the player's balance.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to add.

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Gets the player's current score.
      Returns:
      The score.

    • addScore

      public void addScore(int amount)
      Adds to the player's score.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to add.

    • resetState

      public void resetState()
      Resets player state for a new turn.

    • addEquipment

      public void addEquipment(Snowplow sp, String itemType)
      Adds equipment to a specific snowplow.
      Parameters:
      sp - The snowplow to equip.
      itemType - The type of equipment (e.g., "salter", "sweeper").
